a:r.a:t: We use transaction data to quantify value across multiple levers
We can provide opportunity at stake along a granular list of levers…
…and a standardized two step process enables rapid sizing with limited client support
Opportunity sizing leverages historical transaction-level sales data, typically covering
Prepare data and perform standard cleaning
standardized and tailored to client context
through a structured cleaning process, including:
Assigning consistent product and category hierarchies
Excluding negative sales, costs, and volumes
